name: pg_debyte_ext
en_desc: Example PostgreSQL extension for decoding bytea payloads to JSON using pg_debyte Rust crates.
zh_desc: 使用 pg_debyte Rust 组件将 bytea 载荷解码为 JSON 的 PostgreSQL 示例扩展。
comment: Cargo.toml declares pgrx 0.16.1 and package version 0.1.0; control file declares pg_debyte_ext/default_version 0.1.0; README states this is an example extension.

name: pgbitmap
en_desc: Bitmap-type extension for PostgreSQL
zh_desc: 为 PostgreSQL 提供紧凑位图类型及位运算函数的扩展。
comment: Verified from PGXN META.json/control metadata; BSD license and PostgreSQL >=9.5 runtime prerequisite.

name: kor_search
en_desc: A PostgreSQL extension for Korean-English text search.
zh_desc: 提供韩英文本搜索能力的 PostgreSQL 全文搜索扩展
comment: PGXN META/control confirm kor_search 1.0.0; Makefile installs only shared library, control, and SQL files, with no CLI binary or preload requirement.

name: pg_icu_parser
en_desc: Full text search parser using ICU boundary analysis
zh_desc: 使用 ICU 边界分析的全文搜索解析器
comment: Round 2: pg_icu_parser.control default_version 1.0, Makefile MODULES pg_icu_parser, and SQL create a text search parser backed by C functions. PGXN META version 1.0.0 declares MPL-2.0 and PostgreSQL 10.0.0 runtime prerequisite; PGXN zip source package filename is clear. No explicit preload/LOAD evidence.

name: pg_gembed
en_desc: Generate embeddings inside PostgreSQL
comment: Broad pgext.extension_all discovery import candidate; metadata collected from cited package evidence.

name: tab_tier
en_desc: Extension for date-based, job-driven table partition management.
zh_desc: 基于日期与作业驱动的表分区管理扩展。
comment: PGXN extension metadata and documentation verified; no runtime PG extension dependencies beyond PostgreSQL/plpgsql.

name: test_factory
en_desc: Framework for managing test data
zh_desc: 用于管理 PostgreSQL 测试数据的框架。
comment: PGXN distribution 0.4.2 provides test_factory.control with default_version 0.3.1 and no extension requires; same distribution also contains separate test_factory_pgtap extension, not curated in this row.

name: pg_sweep
en_desc: Collect PostgreSQL database and table statistics as JSON
zh_desc: 以 JSON 形式收集 PostgreSQL 数据库和表统计信息
comment: pgrx extension; version from Cargo.toml because control uses @CARGO_VERSION@

name: norm
en_desc: No-ORM helper extension that generates simple CRUD functions.
zh_desc: 用于生成简单 CRUD 函数、逐步替代 ORM 的 PL/pgSQL 扩展。
comment: Removing ORM one function at a time Main-agent decision: Canonicalized extension name to lowercase norm because Makefile EXTENSION and versioned SQL use norm; NORM.control is treated as upstream filename casing drift.

name: pg-gvm
en_desc: Functions for GVMd
comment: metadata from GitHub raw control/Makefile/Cargo evidence Main-agent decision: Canonicalized extension name to pg-gvm, matching Greenbone CREATE EXTENSION/control generation semantics.

name: uuidv7-sql
en_desc: this is a dbdev package for https://github.com/dverite/postgres-uuidv7-sql Pure SQL functions to use UUIDs v7 in PostgreSQL.
comment: database.dev package metadata collected from registry page Main-agent decision: Canonicalized extension name to upstream uuidv7-sql and switched from database.dev short alias to the source repository.

name: pg_table_range
en_desc: Planning-time partition pruning by per-partition data ranges, including non-key columns.
zh_desc: 基于每个分区的数据范围在规划阶段裁剪分区，并支持非分区键列。
comment: PGXN/GitHub metadata verified. Control default_version uses @CARGO_VERSION@; Cargo.toml and META.json version are 0.1.1; Cargo declares pgrx 0.18.1 and PG16-PG18 feature targets. Control is not relocatable, trusted=false, and has no preload requirement.

name: pg_natural_sort_order
en_desc: Natural sort ordering support through a C normalization function usable with indexes.
zh_desc: 通过 C 语言归一化函数提供可用于索引的自然排序支持。
comment: Control, META.json, Makefile, README, and PGXN metadata verified. Control default_version is 1.0.1 and relocatable=true; Makefile builds MODULE_big and EXTENSION pg_natural_sort_order. PGXN runtime prerequisite declares PostgreSQL >=9.0.0; README says it was tested on PostgreSQL 9.5.

name: mysqlcompat
en_desc: MySQL compatibility functions, aggregates, operators, and casts for PostgreSQL porting.
zh_desc: 为 PostgreSQL 迁移提供 MySQL 兼容函数、聚合、操作符与类型转换。
comment: Control, META.json, Makefile, README, and PGXN metadata verified. META/control version is 0.0.7. Makefile builds SQL extension scripts and has MODULES commented out, so this is treated as puresql/PLpgSQL despite the legacy control module_pathname. PGXN META license is unrestricted, normalized here as Unknown.

name: pg_tier
en_desc: Tier PostgreSQL table data to external S3 storage through parquet_s3_fdw.
zh_desc: 通过 parquet_s3_fdw 将 PostgreSQL 表数据分层迁移到外部 S3 存储。
comment: GitHub/control/Cargo/README verified 2026-06-24. Selected Pandry/pg_tier as the newest visible public upstream for the Tembo pg_tier code; Trunk.toml still points to the historical tembo-io/pg_tier homepage, and andyatkinson/pg_tier is an older 0.0.4 mirror. Control requires parquet_s3_fdw, schema=tier, relocatable=false; Cargo.toml version is 0.0.5 with pgrx 0.11.4 and PG14-PG16 feature targets. No formal GitHub release or tag is published.

name: pgcmp
en_desc: Support extension for pg_comparator, providing checksum and cast functions for PostgreSQL data comparison.
zh_desc: pg_comparator 的支撑扩展，为 PostgreSQL 数据比对提供校验和与类型转换函数。
comment: Project pg_comparator verified as extension pgcmp: Makefile sets EXTENSION=pgcmp, EXTVERSION=3.1, DATA=pgcmp--3.1.sql, and generates pgcmp.control from pgcmp.control.in; README instructs CREATE EXTENSION pgcmp. SQL contains explicit LOAD MODULE_PATHNAME, and the project also installs the pg_comparator command script, so has_bin=true. Git tags stop at older v2.2.5, so last_release_date is left empty for version 3.1.
